records.name: Supporting Fire

records.name: Drill Dart

records.name: Revitalization Contract
records.description: Increases the caster's Status Effect Resist by 16.5% . Increases Status Effect Resist by 10% for 5s when hit while afflicted with Stun, Knockdown, Airborne, Frost, or Fear (up to 10 stacks). Immediately restores 35% Max HP when HP is 10% or less. Healing Cooldown: 60s Status Effect Resist Cooldown: 1s
records.descriptionFr: Augmente le lanceur's Status Effect résistance de 16.5%. Augmente Status Effect résistance de 10% pendant 5 s lorsque hit pendant que affectée par étourdissement, renversement, projection en l’air, gel, or Fear (up à 10 charges). Immediately restores 35% PV max lorsque PV is 10% or less. temps de recharge des soins: 60s Status Effect résistance temps de recharge: 1s
